name: Wish-Bone Marinated Chicken 1-2-3
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup wish bone Italian or Oriental dressing
6 Tyson Holly Farms fresh, individually frozen boneless, skinless chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen chicken, remove protective ice glaze by holding under lukewarm running water for 1 to 2 minutes.
2. In a large, shallow nonaluminum baking dish or plastic bag, pour 3/4 cup Italian or Oriental dressing over the chicken. Seal and refrigerate, turning occasionally, for 30 minutes to 3 hours.
3. Remove the chicken and discard the marinade. Grill or broil the chicken, turning once and brushing frequently with remaining dressing, until a meat thermometer inserted in the thickest part of the chicken reaches 170 degrees F. Chill leftovers immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
